scope.question: Recover the bounded senolytics registry-surveillance follow-up after rejecting a non-compliant isolated worker log, preserving only the candidate ledger and coverage-assessment update that keep the gap open after ClinicalTrials.gov DNS failures.

inputs.summary: Target active-trials registry gap for deferred fisetin frailty registries and broader source-snapshot-backed ClinicalTrials.gov surveillance.
Original bounded context pack for the rejected isolated worker run.

outputs.summary: Successfully recorded a submitted repair candidate and coverage-assessment update documenting that ClinicalTrials.gov importer attempts for NCT03430037, NCT03675724, NCT06133634, and NCT04685590 failed with DNS EAI_AGAIN before source snapshots could be retained. No registry no-results records were added, and the registry-surveillance breadth gap remains open.

proposed_records.rationale: Tracks the bounded follow-up repair attempt and preserves required review lanes without promoting the candidate.
Updates the active-trials registry gap with the 2026-06-29 ClinicalTrials.gov importer failures and keeps the no-results registry gap open until retained source snapshots support closure.

quality_checks.summary: npm run validate:records passed after importing the candidate ledger.
npm run audit:references passed after adding this coordinator recovery ledger.

blocking_issues: ClinicalTrials.gov source-snapshot retrieval was unavailable during the attempted follow-up: importer attempts for NCT03430037, NCT03675724, NCT06133634, and NCT04685590 failed with getaddrinfo EAI_AGAIN for clinicaltrials.gov.
No retained ClinicalTrials.gov source snapshots were created, so no no-results status records were added and the senolytics registry-surveillance breadth gap remains open.
The original isolated worker execution log was rejected because it violated coverage-repair context-discipline requirements with broad repository reads and redacted large command output.
next_actions: Run the generated synthesis_boundary and taxonomy_mapping supervisor-review jobs for coverage-gap-senolytics-registry-surveillance-breadth-followup-2-repair.
Retry source-snapshot-backed ClinicalTrials.gov surveillance in a network-enabled environment before creating any no-results registry records.
Keep worker post-export closeout on the corrected archive-before-regenerate and --all self-healing job refresh path.
